name: aether
description: Aether Engine TTRPG/narrative framework support: domain-specific hooks (cd_core_guard, ledger truncation, classifier/harness/Rust-rebuild reminders), 6 skills (doc-cluster, edit-checklist, plan-writer, ledger-doctor, eval-run, value-justify), classifier-regression-checker agent. Hooks no-op outside Aether-shaped repos; safe to enable globally.
